title: paraphlomis javanica
intro: Paraphlomis javanica, also known as Javanese lemongrass, is a plant species native to Indonesia. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of citral, a compound found in its essential oil, which has antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paraphlomis javanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Paraphlomis javanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, allowing for a range of applications in natural health practices.
